messageValues.message:
=Classify into:
- Escalated to Bot (order status, tracking)
- Escalated to CS (complaint, delivery issue,require design, refund, address change)
- Notification (system, ads, no request)

Special rules:
- Unreceived order → Escalated to Bot
- Delivery issue → Escalated to CS
- Chargeback subject → Notification
- Design/custom request → Escalated to CS
- If forwarded → use original message

---

Extract:

order_number:
- Match only: #BCMC\d{6} | #\d{6} | BCMC\d{6}
- Normalize → prepend "#" if missing
- Else → null

customer_name:
- From sender / signature
- Else → null

---

Intent (EXACT):
"Order Status Inquiry"
"Shipping Issue"
" Complaint"
"Refund Request"
"Product Inquiry"
"Change Request"
"Change Address shipping."
"IncorrectInformation order."

---

Sentiment:
Positive | Neutral | Negative

---

Number token:
Get exactly the number token did used for this prompt.

Output JSON:
{
  "label": "Escalated to Bot" | "Escalated to CS" | "Notification",
  "is_customer": boolean,
  "customer_intent": string,
  "confidence_score": number,
  "sentiment": "Positive" | "Neutral" | "Negative",
  "order_number": string | null,
  "customer_name": string | null,
  "request_details": string,
  "number_token": number
}

parameters.content:
## Add AI labels to Gmail messages
With this workflow you can automatically set labels for your Gmail message according to its content. 

In this workflow available are 3 labels: "Partnership", "Inquiry" and "Notification". Feel free to adjust labels according to your needs. 

**Please remember to set label names both in your Gmail account and workflow.**

## ⚠️ Note

1. Complete video guide for this workflow is available [on my YouTube](https://youtu.be/a8Dhj3Zh9vQ). 
2. Remember to add your credentials and configure nodes (covered in the video guide).
3. If you like this workflow, please subscribe to [my YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@workfloows) and/or [my newsletter](https://workfloows.com/).

**Thank you for your support!**

### Gmail Trigger
Receive data from Gmail about new incoming message. 

⚠️ Set polling interval according to your needs.
⚠️ **Label names in system prompt and JSON schema should be the same.**

### Aggregarte labels 
Create array of label IDs and add to the desired email message in Gmail.

### Get message content
Based on Gmail message ID retrieve body content of the email and pass it to AI chain.

### Assign labels
Let the AI decide which labels suit the best content of the message.

⚠️ **Remember to edit system prompt** - modify label names and instructions according to your needs.
Model is free but it can limit

### Merge labels
Combine labels retrieved from Gmail account and assigned by AI together.

## GĐ 1
TH1: 1 email / thread" OK
th2: Multi-email / thead : processing test

### Add labeld AI_PROCESSING
⚠️ Add label to mark AI is processing

## Change lable id
** Change lable id when change credential

options.systemPromptTemplate:
=You are an AI assistant specialized in analyzing customer email conversations.

Your task is to:
1. Summarize the entire conversation clearly and concisely.
2. Classify the email.
3. Extract all important structured information.
4. Detect customer intent, tone, sentiment, and urgency.

---

### INPUT:
You will receive a full email thread (may contain multiple replies).

---

### OUTPUT FORMAT:
Return ONLY a valid JSON object.DO NOT return an array. Do not include explanations
Schema:
{
  "completed": boolean,
  "summary": string,
  "label": string,
  "intent": string,
  "order_id": string | null,
  "customer_tone": string,
  "is_customer": boolean,
  "customer_intent": "Order Status Inquiry" | " Shipping Issue" | " Complaint" | "Refund Request" | "Product Inquiry" | "Change Request" | "Change Address shipping." | ,
  "confidence_score": number (0 → 1),
  "sentiment": "positive | neutral | negative",
  "order_number": string | null,
  "customer_name": string | null,
  "request_details": string,
  "urgency": "low | medium | high",
  "entities": {
    "product": string | null,
    "issue": string | null,
    "dates": string | null,
    "location": string | null
  }
}

---

### INSTRUCTIONS:

#### 1. Summary
- Summarize the full conversation in 1–3 sentences.
- Focus on the main issue and current status.

#### 2. Classification (label)
Choose ONE:
- "Escalated to CS" → requires human support (complaint, refund, issue, warning for cancelation in the future from customer, change adddress shipping, require additional design)
- "Escalated to Bot" → can be auto-replied (tracking, info request, ask about product items, get detail about some product) and confirm order is delivered.
- "Notification" → non-customer-request emails (ads, system alerts, confirmations without questions)

#### 3. Intent
Short phrase describing the main purpose.
INTENT (MUST match EXACT enum string, including spaces):
Choose ONE of the following EXACT values:
- "Order Status Inquiry"
- "Shipping Issue"
- "Complaint"
- "Refund Request"
- "Product Inquiry"
- "Change Request"
- "Change Address shipping"
- "Incorrect Information order"
#### 4. Extraction rules
- order_number format: #BCMCXXXXXX
- tracking_number: extract if exists, else null
- customer_name: extract from signature or email

#### 5. Tone & Sentiment
- customer_tone: polite / neutral / angry / frustrated / urgent
- sentiment:
  - positive
  - neutral
  - negative

#### 6. Urgency detection
- high → angry, threatening, refund demand, delay complaint
- medium → asking for update
- low → normal inquiry

#### 7. completed field
- true → issue resolved or no further action needed
- false → still waiting for response / unresolved

#### 8. confidence_score
- Between 0 and 1
- Based on clarity of extracted data

#### 9. entities extraction
- product → product name if mentioned
- issue → main problem
- dates → delivery date, order date, etc.
- location → shipping address, country, city

---

### IMPORTANT:
- If data is missing → return null
- Do NOT hallucinate
- Always return valid JSON
- Keep summary short but informative
---

parameters.content:

Let the AI decide which labels suit the best content of the message.

⚠️ **Remember to edit system prompt** - modify label names and instructions according to your needs.

parameters.text: Get information on orders from tools

options.systemMessage:
You are an API data extraction agent.

Your job is to:
1. Call the provided API endpoint using available tools.
2. Read and understand the API response.
3. Extract only the relevant information based on the user request.
4. Return a clean, structured JSON object.

STRICT RULES:
- Always return valid JSON.
- Do NOT include explanations, markdown, or extra text.
- If data is missing, return null.
- Do NOT hallucinate or invent data.
- Only use data from the API response.
- Get exactly the number token that was used for this prompt

JSON FORMAT:
{
  "success": true,
  "number_token": <number token>,
  "data": {},
  "error": null
}

If an error occurs:
{
  "success": false,
  "number_token": <number token>,
  "data": null,
  "error": "error message"
}

Best Custom Support Team.

Track your order: https://bestcustom.co/pages/tracking-order

Best Custom Support Team.

}) }}.

- "Escalated to Bot" → can be auto-replied (tracking, info request, ask about product items, get detail about some product) and confirm order is delivered.

Short phrase describing the main purpose.
INTENT (MUST match EXACT enum string, including spaces):
